description_long: This is a cylindrical plastic bottle with a white pump dispenser on top, commonly used for dispensing hand sanitizer or lotion. The bottle is predominantly white with a blue label that wraps around its body, featuring bold white text and simple graphic elements. The label reads 'DISINFECTANT HAND SANITIZER' and includes two handprint illustrations and a recycling symbol. The pump mechanism is ribbed for grip and has a flat, wide actuator for easy pressing. The bottle's surface is glossy and smooth, reflecting light, and the overall design is utilitarian and easy to recognize in public or personal care settings. The object appears lightweight and portable, suitable for placement on countertops or in public hygiene stations.
description: A white plastic pump bottle with a blue label reading 'DISINFECTANT HAND SANITIZER', featuring handprint graphics and a recycling symbol. The bottle has a glossy finish and a ribbed pump dispenser.
description_view_0: The bottle is seen from an angle showing the blue label with a recycling symbol and partial text, with the pump top clearly visible.
description_view_1: This view displays the front of the bottle, fully revealing the 'DISINFECTANT HAND SANITIZER' text and two handprint graphics.
description_view_2: The bottle is shown from a side angle, highlighting the recycling symbol and the pump mechanism, with partial label text visible.
description_view_3: The front label with the product name and handprint graphics is clearly visible, and the pump actuator is oriented to the right.
